title: Claude Mythos is FINALLY here (Fable 5)
summary: Anthropic released Claude Fable 5, its first Mythos class model, which achieves top performance on benchmarks including SWE Bench Pro and Frontier Code. The model supports vision capabilities, long context windows, and web interaction tasks.
writeup: The video covers Anthropic's release of Claude Fable 5, described as the company's first Mythos class model. It reports top benchmark results on SWE Bench Pro and Frontier Code, alongside vision capabilities, long context windows, and web interaction tasks. The takeaway is a model positioned for code generation and agentic web work, with multimodal and extended context support.
